_meta.note: Curated architecture table merged with live fs.stat. Regenerate after adding a dataset or tool.

nodes.label: CMS Care Compare
nodes.detail: Hospital General Information download. One leg of the us-hospitals merge.

nodes.label: CMS ASC Dataset
nodes.detail: Ambulatory surgical center listing behind us-ascs.json.

nodes.label: CMS Dialysis Dataset
nodes.detail: Dialysis facility compare data behind us-dialysis.json.

nodes.label: CMS DMEPOS CSV
nodes.detail: Supplier directory CSV; build-suppliers.js fetches it from a hardcoded CMS URL.

nodes.label: CDC PLACES
nodes.detail: County health measures via the Socrata API (swc5-untb).

nodes.label: BLS LAUS
nodes.detail: Local Area Unemployment Statistics, county grain.

nodes.label: Census SAIPE
nodes.detail: Small Area Income and Poverty Estimates.

nodes.label: Census SAHIE
nodes.detail: Small Area Health Insurance Estimates.

nodes.label: Census FIPS / us-atlas
nodes.detail: County FIPS spine + us-atlas TopoJSON, pulled from the CDN by build-geo.js.

nodes.label: AHRQ Compendium 2023
nodes.detail: Health-system crosswalk merged into us-hospitals.json.

nodes.label: HIFLD / CovidCareMap
nodes.detail: Bed counts and facility geometry merged into us-hospitals.json.

nodes.label: BLS OOH
nodes.detail: Occupational Outlook Handbook pay + growth behind the career tree BLS layers.

nodes.label: Hand-Curated (editorial)
nodes.detail: The editorial layer: vendors, career tree structure, atlas concepts, registries, metric ledger.

nodes.label: pull/places.js
nodes.detail: Refreshable CDC PLACES pull. Dry-run by default; writes county metrics into countyData.json.

nodes.label: pull/bls.js
nodes.detail: Refreshable BLS LAUS pull. Dry-run by default.

nodes.label: pull/saipe.js
nodes.detail: Refreshable Census SAIPE pull. Dry-run by default.

nodes.label: pull/sahie.js
nodes.detail: Refreshable Census SAHIE pull. Dry-run by default.

nodes.label: build-suppliers.js
nodes.detail: Fetch-on-build from a hardcoded CMS DMEPOS URL; splits the directory into four supplier datasets.

nodes.label: build-geo.js
nodes.detail: Pulls us-atlas TopoJSON from the CDN; writes the county population and lakes basemap files.

nodes.label: build-data.js
nodes.detail: Rollups: facilities by state / county / system, national summary, suppliers by state. Build-only outputs.

nodes.label: build-entities.js
nodes.detail: 10-adapter unified graph. Reads every major dataset, validates links, writes the search graph.

nodes.label: us-hospitals.json
nodes.detail: 5,366 hospitals. CMS Care Compare merged with the AHRQ system crosswalk and HIFLD/CovidCareMap beds.

nodes.label: us-ascs.json
nodes.detail: 5,611 ambulatory surgical centers.

nodes.label: us-dialysis.json
nodes.detail: 7,557 dialysis facilities.

nodes.label: us-suppliers-pharmacy.json
nodes.detail: 40,606 pharmacy locations. The single heaviest deployed file on the site.

nodes.label: us-suppliers-dme.json
nodes.detail: 6,367 DME supplier locations.

nodes.label: us-suppliers-optical.json
nodes.detail: 5,023 optical supplier locations.

nodes.label: us-suppliers-orthotics-prosthetics.json
nodes.detail: 4,566 orthotics and prosthetics locations.

nodes.label: us-counties.json
nodes.detail: County population spine.

nodes.label: us-lakes.json
nodes.detail: Basemap water geometry.

nodes.label: countyData.json
nodes.detail: County metrics across 3 lenses. The one dataset the four pull scripts refresh.

nodes.label: career-tree.json
nodes.detail: The tiered-hex career structure: roles, tiers, paths.

nodes.label: career-tree-bls.json
nodes.detail: BLS pay + outlook enrichment keyed role → SOC.

nodes.label: career-tree-growth-detail.json
nodes.detail: Per-tile growth how/show enrichment.

nodes.label: vendors.json
nodes.detail: 117 vendors across 20 healthcare-tech sectors.

nodes.label: derived/search-graph.json
nodes.detail: 23,090-node unified graph. The one build-entities artifact that deploys; lazy-loaded since 2026-07.

nodes.label: stateData.json
nodes.detail: 7 lenses of state metrics, sourced per the metricsConfig ledger. EMBEDDED into the Multi-Lens Map at build.

nodes.label: metricsConfig.json
nodes.detail: The provenance ledger: every metric, its source, year, and units.

nodes.label: dataYears.json
nodes.detail: Data-vintage year stamps embedded at build.

nodes.label: registries/ (6 files)
nodes.detail: The shared spine: geo, counties, systems, facility-types, ownership, taxonomy. The backbone adapter reads these.

nodes.label: entities.json
nodes.detail: The typed node graph. Lives outside src/ on purpose: NOT deployed. Injected into Atlas Craft at build.

nodes.label: search-index.json
nodes.detail: Build-time search index. NOT deployed; the live atlas fetches search-graph.json instead.

nodes.label: facilities-by-state.json
nodes.detail: Build-only rollup consumed by src/_data at template time. NOT deployed.

nodes.label: facilities-by-county.json
nodes.detail: Build-only rollup. NOT deployed.

nodes.label: facilities-by-system.json
nodes.detail: Build-only rollup. NOT deployed.

nodes.label: national-summary.json
nodes.detail: Build-only national rollup. NOT deployed.

nodes.label: suppliers-by-state.json
nodes.detail: Build-only supplier rollup; the suppliers adapter reads this, not the four big files.

nodes.label: Operators Map
nodes.detail: The facility map. Eager basemap + hospitals; every other layer lazy-loads on toggle.

nodes.label: Multi-Lens Map
nodes.detail: State choropleth, 7 lenses. State data rides in the HTML at build; county grain fetches at init.

nodes.label: Career Tree
nodes.detail: Tiered-hex role progression with BLS pay/outlook enrichment.

nodes.label: Vendor Directory
nodes.detail: 20 sectors, 117 vendors, sourced market-share carousel.

nodes.label: Atlas (search + HUD)
nodes.detail: The hex atlas. Search rides the unified graph, lazy-fetched on first use.

nodes.label: Atlas Craft
nodes.detail: Relationship-explorer canvas. The entity graph is injected into the template at build.

nodes.label: Hospital Map
nodes.detail: Camera-zoom map. No external data files.

nodes.label: Clinical SQL Mystery
nodes.detail: Synthetic in-page data. Nothing fetched.

nodes.label: Iceberg Map
nodes.detail: Hand-drawn concept map. No data files.

nodes.label: Learn / Rounds pages
nodes.detail: Editorial pages that pull stateData-derived stats at build.
